svg.text: Two paths : (1) Chat-RAG turn in C3 ; (2) Pipeline goal driven by C4. Numbered arrows give the ordering ; dashed verticals are component lifelines.

g.text: 1. Chat prompt → RAG retrieval → LLM → SSE reply (with optional DocGen tool-loop)
Phase B — Federated RAG retrieval (C7 → ArangoDB vector + KG)
⑤ (Tranche B) Resolve PromptReferences : GET /documents/{path} via C4 → MinIO bytes
⑦b graph traversal (entity links, related docs)
Phase C — Prompt assembly + C8 LLM call (streaming OR DocGen tool-loop)
Phase D — Optional DocGen tool-loop (D-015) : LLM emits tool_calls → C3 executes against C4 /documents
⑬ POST /documents | PUT /{path} | DELETE — live-docs MinIO write + Gitea single-commit push (R-200-155)
Persistence : assistant message + `events` ledger (InlineEvent[]) + user message `references` (metadata only, R-200-182) in `c3_messages`.
2. C4 Orchestrator pipeline — 5 phases / 3 gates / materialise to artifacts surface
Phases 1..5 — brainstorm → spec → plan → generate → review (each phase: drain steer, retrieve, dispatch agent, evaluate gate)
loop for phase in [brainstorm, spec, plan, generate, review]
⑨ dispatch agent (architect | planner | implementer | spec-reviewer | quality-reviewer)
⑪ status: DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | NEEDS_CONTEXT | BLOCKED
⑬ on Gate B pass : ArtifactsService.put_file × N → mark_completed → Gitea push (R-200-150..152, R-200-146)
After loop — Run reaches COMPLETED | BLOCKED — UI polls GET /runs/{id} (RunPublic with trace[200] window)
⑮ RunPublic { current_phase, status, trace[200], concerns, block_reason? }
⑯ POST /runs/{id}/steer (operator hint) — queued, drained at next ⑤
